model: Continental R Project 116 by Mulliner Park Ward
description: An Italian Bentley and Rolls-Royce distributor, Carlo Talamo, had always dreamt of owning a Blower Bentley and so he made use of Bentley's new-at-the-time Special Order Program to have them build his dream car, a feat which cost him twice as much as a regular Continental R.
creator: Pfugs
